description_long: This car store is a single-story commercial building with a flat, dark roof and a rectangular footprint. The exterior features a combination of light-colored walls and bold red accent elements, including a prominent cube above the entrance. The front area includes a covered drive-through or drop-off zone, with several cars parked in designated spaces and a few round, red-topped outdoor tables with chairs. The parking lot extends to one side, providing ample space for customer vehicles, while the rear and sides of the building are more utilitarian, with service access and additional parking. Large windows are visible at the front, suggesting a showroom area for displaying vehicles. The overall design is modern and functional, with clean lines and minimal ornamentation.
description: A modern, single-story car store with a flat roof, red accents, large front windows, and an adjacent parking lot. Outdoor seating and multiple cars are visible around the building.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entrance, covered drive-through, outdoor seating, and several cars parked in front and to the side.
description_view_1: Side/rear view highlighting the parking lot, service access, and fewer decorative elements; less emphasis on the entrance.
description_view_2: Rear view with visible parking, a few cars, and the back of the building; outdoor tables and the drive-through are visible on the sides.
description_view_3: Angled view showing the front entrance, red accent cube, outdoor tables, and a clear view of the parking lot layout.
attribute_signage: A large red cube above the main entrance serves as signage; no visible text or branding, but the design is bold and modern.
attribute_displayed_cars: Seven cars are visible: a mix of sedans and compact cars in red, blue, white, and gray, parked in front, at the side, and in the parking lot.
attribute_glass_facade: Large glass windows at the front of the building, spanning the entrance area and likely serving as a showroom display.
attribute_architectural_style: Modern, with clean lines, flat roof, and bold geometric accents.
